---
title: "Hampshire Blind School, The"
---

## Hampshire Blind School, The

**Type:** organization

### About

A report of its AGM in the <i>Hampshire Telegraph </i>(13 February  1897) speaks of the 33rd annual report, which would put its origin around 1864.  It seems to have been in Southsea.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
